motto: Public DNS, DHCP, and time — loopback-first, sovereign-gated, never lose a cycle.
vulnerabilities_retired: Hardcoded DNS admin passkeys in seed only — env or Hostess7 required in production
DHCP bind 0.0.0.0 without takeover primary — blocked by default
Pool NTP as sole authority — sovereign-first policy
dig-per-query fork bomb — rate limits + takeover gating retained
DHCP REQUEST without option-50 pool match — rejected in v2026
No ARP/ping conflict detect on lease — ping probe before OFFER
Cleartext admin on 7/77/777 — localhost bind default; TLS panel preferred
SQUIDGIE blocking NTP replies — retired; threats log, derived time always serves

security_model.cycle: sovereign-cycle-state.json — monotonic, never backward, never skipped
security_model.sync_ledger: sovereign-sync-ledger.jsonl — append-only, fsync, never lose data

receive_verify: derived time from anchor under threat
